title: leptolepia novae-zelandiae
intro: Leptolepia novae-zelandiae, also known as the New Zealand Ladyfern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which are said to include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues and reducing inflammation, and is often used to support overall well-being. Leptolepia novae-zelandiae can be prepared for use in herbal remedies through infusions or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
